title: March 31 deadline looms: Here are last-minute tax-saving moves for FY 26
summary: You can bump up your tax deductions under ‘Section 80C’ if you are still under the old tax regime by adding ₹50000 to the NPS (National Pension Scheme). The NPS addition under ‘Section 80CCD(1B))’ will take your total deduction to ₹2 lakh.

title: Why estate planning in India is never a one-size-fits-all
summary: India's diverse legal landscape complicates estate planning, influenced by personal laws, marriage statutes, and geography. For interfaith couples, these layers can overwhelm, necessitating clear wills&nbsp;

title: Planning your daughter’s future? Here are 10 money moves parents must make
summary: Planning your daughter’s future involves investing in products such as Sukanya Samriddhi, mutual funds, PPF, insurance, and health cover while setting clear goals to ensure financial security and long-term growth for her future.

title: Legal heir vs nominee explained: Why estate planning is crucial before writing your will
summary: Planning your will? There is a difference between a legal heir and a nominee when it comes to inheritance. Here is how estate planning can help your family sidestep complications in the event of a sudden death…

title: Turned 60? Here are 5 smart asset allocation strategies for a secure retirement
summary: Discover smart asset allocation strategies for retirement that safeguard your savings, boost growth, and secure a steady income for a worry-free, comfortable future.

title: Don’t let rent eat your paycheck: A starter guide
summary: Rent shapes everything: how much you save, how stressed you are, and how quickly you build a financial cushion. As rents climb and entry-level salaries struggle to keep pace, the tough question is: how much is too much?

title: LPG price hike, supply crunch, and the pivot to alternate means
summary: Rising LPG prices, supply delays and black market spikes are squeezing households and small eateries, triggering a rush toward electric cooking alternatives.

title: Market volatility scaring you? 6 timeless investment lessons from ‘Think and Grow Rich’ by Napoleon Hill
summary: Timeless investment lessons from ‘Think and Grow Rich’ show key strategies to stay confident, make smarter decisions, and grow wealth even during uncertain and volatile market conditions.

title: Zerodha's Nithin Kamath warns corporate health insurance may not be enough — here's why
summary: Nithin Kamath advises against relying solely on employer-provided health insurance due to limitations and potential gaps. He emphasises the importance of purchasing a personal health policy for better coverage and financial protection, especially given the rising medical inflation in India.

title: Chennai Petroleum announces Rs 8 per share dividend, sets April 2 as record date. Check dividend yield
summary: Chennai Petroleum Corporation announced an interim dividend of Rs 8 per share for FY 2025-26, payable by April 25. Shares remain strong, up over 60% in a year, trading above key moving averages.

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
summary: Indian benchmark indices rallied for a second session, led by banks, auto and consumer stocks. Nifty climbed above 23,300 while Sensex reclaimed 75,000. Analysts see near-term bullish momentum, though global uncertainties, volatility and resistance levels may cap further upside.

title: US Stocks: Wave Life Sciences shares plunge 58% as data for high dose of obesity drug disappoints
summary: Wave Life Sciences shares plunged ​58% on Thursday after a higher dose of its experimental obesity drug failed to show a clear improvement at reducing a dangerous type of belly fat.

title: US Stocks: Equitable, Corebridge set to merge, create $22 billion US insurance giant
summary: U.S. insurers Equitable and Corebridge Financial said on ​Thursday they will merge in an all-stock deal that would create a $22 billion retirement, life ​insurance and asset management company.

title: Low US weekly unemployment claims point to stable labor market
summary: New applications for U.S. unemployment benefits rose slightly last ​week, suggesting the labor market remains stable and likely giving ​the Federal Reserve scope to hold interest rates steady while monitoring inflation risks from the conflict in the Middle ​East.

title: US Stocks: Kodiak Sciences shares soar 68% after eye drug succeeds in late-stage study
summary: Shares of ​Kodiak Sciences surged 68.6% to their highest in more than ​four years on Thursday after the drug developer's experimental drug met the main goal in a late-stage study in patients with diabetes-related eye damage.

title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Triveni Engineering and Authum on Friday for gains up to 23%
summary: Nifty extended gains for a second session, led by banks, auto and consumer stocks amid easing Middle East tensions. Analysts see bullish momentum sustaining above key support, with upside potential if resistance levels are crossed, while highlighting selective stock buying opportunities.

title: Vadodara to raise Rs 200 cr from municipal bonds by July
summary: The Vadodara civic body is aiming to raise another Rs 200 crore through the municipal bonds route by July this year, people familiar with the development have said.

title: US stocks today: US stocks open lower with no Iran peace breakthrough in sight
summary: Wall Street stocks opened lower as oil prices surged, fueled by escalating tensions between the US and Iran and a lack of immediate peace prospects. Investors are concerned about the economic impact of high oil prices, while memory chip manufacturers faced declines following new AI research.

title: Gold price today: Yellow metal slides Rs 4,300/10g, silver tanks Rs 13,700/kg as MCX reopens post Ram Navami break
summary: Gold and silver prices fell sharply as MCX trading resumed after the Ram Navami holiday. Gold dropped Rs 4,300 per 10g to Rs 1,39,800, while silver slid Rs 13,700 per kg to Rs 2,21,146. Domestic bullion followed global cues, with COMEX gold down 2.87% and silver falling 7%.
